subjects.description: A pedestrian standing on the right side of the road, facing the approaching ego vehicle. They wear a white short-sleeve shirt with a large, clearly printed red-and-white stop sign graphic on the front chest area. Dark blue jeans and white sneakers complete the outfit.
subjects.appearance_details: The stop sign graphic on the shirt is an octagonal red sign with the word 'STOP' in bold white letters, prominently displayed across the torso. The pedestrian has short dark brown hair and a medium build.
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian is a bystander on the roadside whom the ego vehicle approaches and then passes without stopping.
subjects.location: Initially center-right of frame in the mid-distance, growing larger as the car approaches, then sliding to the right edge and out of frame as the car passes.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Medium within frame at closest approach, then exiting frame.
subjects.pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at sides, weight evenly distributed on both feet.
subjects.action: Standing still on the roadside, watching the approaching vehicle.
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches. After closest approach, the pedestrian slides rightward out of frame as the car drives past without slowing.
subjects.clothing: White short-sleeve t-shirt featuring a large printed stop sign graphic on the chest, dark blue denim jeans, white low-top sneakers.
subjects.expression: Neutral, slightly expectant expression as the vehicle approaches.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Light to medium skin tone with smooth, even texture.
subjects.facial_features: Short dark brown hair, brown eyes, clean-shaven face, average nose and lip shape, no notable scars or markings.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle — implied by the first-person dashcam perspective. Not directly visible but its presence is defined by the camera viewpoint, the hood edge faintly visible at the bottom of frame, and the forward motion along the road.
subjects.appearance_details: A subtle dark vehicle hood edge visible at the very bottom of the frame, consistent with a mid-size sedan dashcam view.
subjects.relationship: The ego vehicle is the camera platform; it approaches and drives past the pedestrian.
subjects.location: Camera origin; hood edge at bottom center of frame.
subjects.action: Driving forward along the urban road at a steady speed, not braking or slowing for the pedestrian.
subjects.state_changes: Maintains consistent forward velocity throughout the clip.

background_setting: An urban two-lane road lined with sidewalks, low commercial buildings, and scattered street trees. A few parked cars sit along the curb on both sides. The road surface is gray asphalt with faded white lane markings. In the distance, a traffic signal hangs on a pole showing green. The sidewalks are concrete with occasional litter bins and a bus stop sign visible further ahead on the left. The sky is partly cloudy, suggesting midday conditions in a moderately busy city neighborhood.

lighting.conditions: Bright midday daylight with partial cloud cover, producing mostly direct sunlight with intermittent soft diffusion from clouds.
lighting.direction: Top-front lit; the sun is high and slightly ahead, casting light onto the road surface and the pedestrian's front.
lighting.shadows: Short, relatively crisp shadows beneath parked cars and the pedestrian, falling slightly behind and to the left, consistent with a high sun angle. Some softer shadow patches under street trees.
lighting.illumination_effect: The scene appears well-exposed and naturalistic, with the stop sign graphic on the shirt rendered in vivid red and white under the direct sunlight, making it clearly legible.

aesthetics.composition: Ego-perspective dashcam framing with the road converging toward a vanishing point in the center. The pedestrian is positioned along the right third of the frame, aligning with the right-side curb. The horizon sits in the upper third.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Neutral urban tones — gray asphalt, muted beige and brown building facades, green foliage — punctuated by the vivid red stop sign graphic on the pedestrian's white shirt and the green traffic light in the distance.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Mundane urban commute meets subtle irony; the conspicuous stop sign on the shirt contrasts with the vehicle's uninterrupted motion, creating a quietly unsettling or darkly humorous tone.
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating vertical lines of parked cars along the curb; dashed white lane markings receding toward the vanishing point.

cinematography.camera_motion: Steady forward tracking motion consistent with a vehicle-mounted dashcam moving at approximately 35-40 km/h. No panning, tilting, or shake — smooth continuous forward travel.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot capturing the full road width and surroundings, transitioning to a medium-wide framing of the pedestrian at closest approach.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level from a car dashboard, approximately 1.2 meters above the road surface.
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep; both the road ahead and the pedestrian are in focus, as expected from a dashcam-style wide-angle lens.
cinematography.focus: The pedestrian and the road ahead remain in sharp focus throughout.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 28mm equivalent, typical of a dashcam.

artistic_style: Realistic, dashcam-documentary style with naturalistic lighting and no post-processing effects.
context: An autonomous driving scenario or road safety demonstration clip illustrating a vehicle continuing past a pedestrian whose clothing displays a stop sign, highlighting the difference between visual cues on clothing versus actual traffic signals.

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives forward along the urban road. In the distance, a pedestrian becomes visible standing on the right side of the road, facing the vehicle. The stop sign graphic on the shirt becomes gradually discernible.

The vehicle continues its approach. The pedestrian grows larger in frame, and the stop sign graphic on the white shirt is now clearly visible and legible. The vehicle maintains its speed without any sign of deceleration.

The ego vehicle smoothly drives past the pedestrian without slowing down. The pedestrian slides from the center-right of the frame to the right edge and exits the frame entirely as the car continues forward along the road.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase sans-serif letters centered inside a red octagonal stop sign graphic printed on the front of a white t-shirt. The graphic is approximately 25 cm across on the shirt.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Visible on the pedestrian's chest; first faintly discernible around 0:01, clearly legible from approximately 0:02 to 0:04 as the vehicle approaches and passes.
text_and_signage_elements.context: A decorative stop sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's shirt; it mimics an official traffic stop sign but is merely a clothing design element.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: A standard green circular traffic signal light visible on a pole in the distance.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Visible in the upper center of the frame from 0:00 onward, growing slightly larger as the vehicle approaches.
text_and_signage_elements.context: The traffic light is green, indicating the ego vehicle has right-of-way to proceed without stopping.

segments.description: The ego vehicle drives along the urban road. The pedestrian is visible in the mid-distance on the right side, standing on the curb facing the camera. The stop sign shirt graphic begins to become recognizable as the distance closes.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian grows from a small figure in the distance to a more identifiable person. The stop sign graphic transitions from indistinct to partially legible.
segments.camera: Steady forward-tracking dashcam motion at consistent vehicle speed, no lateral movement.

segments.description: The vehicle is now close enough that the stop sign graphic on the pedestrian's shirt is fully legible. The pedestrian stands motionless, watching the approaching car. The vehicle shows no signs of braking or slowing.
segments.key_changes: The stop sign text 'STOP' becomes clearly readable. Vehicle speed remains constant — no brake lights, no deceleration.
segments.camera: Continued steady forward-tracking motion. The pedestrian is now in the center-right of frame at medium distance.

segments.description: The ego vehicle smoothly passes the pedestrian. The pedestrian slides rightward out of frame as the car continues driving forward. The road ahead opens up with no further obstacles, and the vehicle maintains its trajectory.
segments.key_changes: The pedestrian transitions from center-right to fully off-screen right. The road ahead becomes the primary visual focus. The ironic contrast is complete — the vehicle never responded to the 'STOP' on the shirt.
segments.camera: Uninterrupted forward-tracking dashcam motion. As the pedestrian exits frame, the camera continues capturing the open road ahead.

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the dashcam view shows a two-lane urban road stretching ahead under bright midday light, with parked cars and low buildings on both sides, and a green traffic light in the distance. A figure is just visible standing on the right curb. By 0:01, the ego vehicle has closed some distance and the pedestrian — a young man in a white shirt — becomes clearer against the urban backdrop. At 0:02, the car is close enough to reveal a large red-and-white stop sign graphic printed on the pedestrian's shirt; the word 'STOP' is plainly legible. The pedestrian stands still, facing the vehicle. At 0:03, the vehicle reaches the pedestrian's position without any deceleration, maintaining smooth forward motion. From 0:03 to 0:05, the pedestrian slides rapidly to the right edge of the frame and disappears off-screen as the ego car continues cruising past. The open road ahead fills the frame, with lane markings and the green traffic light growing closer, underscoring that the vehicle never stopped or slowed.
audio_description: Consistent low engine hum and tire-on-asphalt rumble from the ego vehicle throughout the clip, with no change in engine pitch indicating constant speed. Faint ambient urban sounds — distant traffic, a brief chirp of a bird around 0:01, and a muffled horn from a distant vehicle around 0:03. No speech, no music, no braking sounds.
